owner_note: Skill 56 OWNS this labeling grammar. Skill 49 (Signature Funnel) pins the reciprocal forward-ref in its MASTERDOC.md §8 ('Reciprocal with Skill 56'). One grammar, both engines, shared stage vocabulary, so a mixed pipeline (signature main + direct-response high-ticket) labels coherently.

fields.client: kebab slug of the client (from GHL location/contact). RUNTIME DATA ONLY (rule R5) — never in this fleet-wide repo.
fields.funnel: kebab slug of the OFFER (not the product line).
fields.stage: fixed vocabulary shared with Skill 49's 3/5/7 matrix.
fields.type: what the asset IS — never the model that wrote it (rule R1).
fields.version: 2-digit version, bumped per regeneration run (v01, v02, ...).
fields.variant: lowercase letter, ONLY for true A/B twins of the same stage (v01a / v01b). Absent when single-variant.

surfaces.ghl_funnel_name: ZHC <client> <funnel> v<NN>  (ZHC UPPERCASE — Skill 6 mandate, rule R4)
surfaces.email_subject: Your <funnel> sales page assets are ready

binding_rules.R1: NO model names in labels, ever. 'Claude File'/'Gemini File' become ...__main__copy__v01a / ...__main__copy__v01b. Model provenance lives in funnel-manifest.json metadata only.
binding_rules.R2: version vs variant. Rerun = version bump (v02). Two deliberate twins of one stage in one run = variant letters (v01a/v01b). Never encode a rerun as a new variant.
binding_rules.R3: one key, every surface. The same asset key threads the Drive doc, fragment file, GHL media path, step name, board card, ledger, and certificate.
binding_rules.R4: ZHC prefix on every GHL container (funnel/website/step), UPPERCASE, via ghl_builder.ensure_zhc_prefix — Skill 6 hard rule.
binding_rules.R5: client slugs are RUNTIME data — NEVER in the fleet-wide repo, its templates, prompts, or examples. Repo examples use fictional slugs (jane-doe, glow-method).
binding_rules.R6: stages are the shared vocabulary across BOTH engines (Signature + Direct-Response).
